novel_features.name: Splash now
novel_features.description: Just the current center-slot splash headline with image, outbound URL, red flag, and how long it has been on splash.
novel_features.rationale: No existing Drudge scraper exposes the splash slot alone with its color flag and tenure; Drudge's editorial signal is the splash, not a flat headline list.
novel_features.why_it_matters: When an agent is asked 'what's on Drudge right now?' this is the one-shot bounded answer; no HTML soup to re-parse.

novel_features.name: Breaking (red items)
novel_features.description: Every headline currently set in red by Drudge's editor, ordered by slot importance.
novel_features.rationale: Red is Drudge's strongest editorial urgency cue; no peer scraper captures the `<font color=red>` style attribute.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Tells an agent the difference between 'on Drudge' and 'Drudge thinks this is breaking,' a high-signal filter at zero token cost.

novel_features.name: Ranked headlines
novel_features.description: All current headlines ranked by composite editorial weight (slot + red + image), not by chronology.
novel_features.rationale: Every existing scraper either dumps a flat list or groups by raw position; none weights slot * color * image presence the way a reader's eye does.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Returns Drudge in priority order with bounded payloads agents can pipe.

novel_features.name: Promotions and demotions since last fetch
novel_features.description: Slot transitions and color changes between consecutive snapshots: promoted to splash, demoted from splash, went red, disappeared, appeared.
novel_features.rationale: Requires stable story_id and snapshot history that none of the archived scrapers maintain.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets an agent answer 'what changed on Drudge?' without re-fetching the page or diffing screenshots.

novel_features.name: Splash tenure
novel_features.description: How long the current splash has been the splash, plus the all-time longest-tenured splash leaderboard.
novel_features.rationale: Tenure is the strongest Drudge-driving-narrative signal and no peer tool surfaces it.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Distinguishes 'breaking right now' from 'Drudge wants this to stick,' a question agents and journalists both need.

novel_features.name: Source leaderboard with deltas
novel_features.description: Outbound-domain frequency leaderboard over a window with rising/falling delta vs the prior window, optionally crosstabbed by slot.
novel_features.rationale: lukerosiak/drudge tracked source frequency but never deltas; the by-slot crosstab (WaPo as splash vs WaPo in column) is new.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Surfaces editorial bent shifts week over week; high-leverage for media analysts and agents writing about narrative pickup.

novel_features.name: On-this-date
novel_features.description: Reconstruct Drudge at any past timestamp the CLI has observed: splash, red items, ranked headlines as of that moment.
novel_features.rationale: Drudge has no archive of its own; this command exists because we keep snapshot history locally.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers 'what was Drudge leading with when X happened?' — a question the live site cannot.

novel_features.name: Editorial-bent index
novel_features.description: Ratio of red items by outbound domain over a window: which outlets Drudge tends to break vs which he tends to merely column.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining stories.is_red x outbound_domain x snapshots; no peer tool joins these.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Quantifies a previously gut-feel media-criticism observation; agents writing media-analysis copy can cite numbers.

novel_features.name: Story timeline
novel_features.description: Every slot_event for one story_id ordered by timestamp: when it appeared, where it moved, when it went red, when it dropped, total tenure.
novel_features.rationale: Only possible because stories carry stable IDs across snapshots; no peer scraper has stable IDs.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets an agent reconstruct one story's editorial life on Drudge, useful for retrospective newsletter analysis.

novel_features.name: Weekly digest
novel_features.description: One-pager: splash count, longest-tenured splash, top 5 outbound domains, biggest red-surge stories over the week.
novel_features.rationale: Composes splash-history, tenure, sources, and bent into one call; no peer tool summarizes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Replaces the 'what did Drudge feature this week' graf that journalists currently assemble by hand.

narrative.headline: Drudge Report in your terminal, with the editorial signal (splash, red, slot, tenure) the live page broadcasts but no other scraper preserves.
narrative.value_prop: Read Drudge's lead, breaking-red items, and ranked headlines in one bounded JSON call. Keep a local SQLite snapshot history so you can answer 'what's changed since I checked,' 'how long has that been the splash,' and 'what was Drudge leading with on Tuesday' — none of which the live site supports.

quickstart.comment: the one command an agent should reach for first when asked 'what's on Drudge?'
every red headline right now, ordered by slot
snapshot the current page into local SQLite so tail/tenure/on-date have history to draw on
what got promoted, demoted, or went red in the last 6 hours
longest-tenured splashes the CLI has observed

troubleshoots.symptom: splash and headlines return zero stories
troubleshoots.fix: drudgereport doctor — confirms drudgereport.com is reachable; if the page layout changes, the parser may need an update
run drudgereport sync at least twice with some time between, since tail diffs consecutive snapshots

troubleshoots.symptom: tenure shows 0s for the current splash
troubleshoots.fix: sync history doesn't extend back far enough; tenure reports the earliest captured_at the local store has

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI when the task is 'what is Drudge featuring' or 'how has Drudge framed X over time.' It is read-only, the local SQLite store rewards repeated sync runs with deeper analytics, and the agent surface returns bounded JSON. Not the right tool for live breaking news outside Drudge's curation.

recipes.title: Just the splash, for a daily briefing
recipes.explanation: Bounded payload with every signal an agent needs to summarize Drudge's lead in one sentence.

recipes.title: What's red right now
recipes.explanation: Every red headline with its slot; lets the agent distinguish splash-red from column-red without re-parsing the page.

recipes.title: Top 10 ranked headlines with select-narrowing
recipes.explanation: Returns the priority-ordered list of stories in agent-friendly shape with only the fields needed for downstream framing.

recipes.title: What changed in the last 6 hours
recipes.explanation: Slot_event rows for promotions, demotions, color changes, and disappearances; cheaper than diffing two fetches.

recipes.title: Which outlets Drudge leaned on this week
recipes.explanation: Outbound-domain leaderboard split by slot (splash vs red vs column) over the trailing 7 days, with rising/falling delta vs the prior 7 days.
